title: Delete with reference safety
description: A project owner or AI tool deletes a document and the tool refuses to silently orphan its dependants, offering a cascade flag for intentional sub-tree removal.
iWant: to delete a document without silently orphaning the documents that depend on it
soThat: I cannot accidentally break the tree

acceptanceCriteria.description: Deleting a document with dependants without the cascade flag is refused and the blocking references are listed
acceptanceCriteria.given: a document with children or inbound references
acceptanceCriteria.when: delete runs without a cascade flag
acceptanceCriteria.then: nothing is deleted and the blocking references are listed

acceptanceCriteria.description: Deleting with the cascade flag removes the sub-tree and cleans parent references, leaving the tree valid
acceptanceCriteria.when: delete runs with a cascade flag
acceptanceCriteria.then: the document and its children are removed and every parent reference to them is cleaned up, leaving the tree valid

acceptanceCriteria.description: Deleting an unreferenced document removes the file and updates the parent id list
acceptanceCriteria.then: the file is removed and the parent id list is updated, leaving the tree valid
